title: Can You Instruct a Robot to Make a PBJ Sandwich?
full_text:
3-minute challenge
 

 
 

 
 

 Meet Robbie, a relentlessly literal robot.
 Robbie follows your instructions exactly — no assumptions, no common sense, no "figuring it out."
 
 

 Most people think they can explain a simple process. Most people are wrong.
 

 
 

 
 

 Free. No signup required. Takes about 3 minutes.
 
 

 Built by The Deliberate Company
